content:wysiwyg_basic:0:0.html:
Theme

Southern Territorial Ordination & Commissioning of the Keepers of the Covenant

Loving Like Jesus
1 John 4:11-12

“My dear, dear friends. If God loved us like this, we certainly ought to love each other. No one has seen God, ever. But if we love one another, God dwells deeply within us, and his love becomes complete in us-perfect love!”

Trailer Promo

 
 

Photo Gallery

Register

Celebrate God’s Work. Honor Service. Be Inspired.

Join us for Commissioning Weekend as we celebrate God’s call on the lives of new leaders in The Salvation Army. Together, we’ll honor faithful service, welcome newly commissioned officers, and recognize the volunteers and congregations whose support has made this journey possible. Experience vibrant worship, uplifting messages, and meaningful connection—celebrating faith, shared life, and the joy of serving God in community.

Location: Atlanta Temple, 2090 N. Druid Hills Rd. N.E., Brookhaven, GA, 30329

Date: June 5 – June 7, 2026

✅ Reserve your seat today!

Register Here

Event Schedule

Join us for a meaningful weekend of shared moments, renewed purpose, and celebration!

8:30am – 6:30pm Trade Store Open @ THQ

10:00am – 12:00pm Commencement Service @ Atlanta Temple

12:00pm – 1:30pm Silver Star Luncheon @ THQ Magnolia Room (By Invitation only)

7:00pm – 8:30pm Main Session @ Atlanta Temple

7:00pm – 8:30pm Youth Conference Main Session @ THQ Conference Center (Must be pre-registered)

8:30pm – 10:30pm Territorial Priority Party @ Atlanta Temple

*After evening session Trade Open @ Atlanta Temple

*Registration/Event Check-in Times @ Atlanta Temple:

  • 8:45am – 10:00am
  • 11:30am – 12:30pm
  • 5:00pm – 7:30pm

10:00am – 12:00pm Main Session @ Atlanta Temple

10:00am – 12:00pm Youth Conference Main Session @ THQ Conference Center (Must be pre-registered)

12:00pm – 1:30pm Lunch Provided for ALL attendees @ Atlanta Temple

12:00pm – 3:00pm Trade Store Open @ THQ

Afternoon Free with available optional activities

4:00pm – 6:00pm Long Service Recognition Dinner @ THQ Magnolia Room (By Invitation only)

7:00pm – 9:00pm Main Session @ Atlanta Temple

7:00pm – 9:00pm Youth Conference Main Session @ THQ Conference Center (Must be pre-registered)

*Registration/Event Check-in Time @ Atlanta Temple:

  • 9:00am – 10:30am

9:30am – 12:00pm Commissioning & Ordination Service

Keepers of the Covenant Session

Download the schedule and share with friends to make sure no one misses out!

Download Schedule

Special Guests

Captain Shinyoung Kang

Captain Shinyoung Kang is a dedicated Salvation Army officer of Houston International Corps. She is known for her passionate leadership and commitment to community service. She has served in various capacities, inspiring others through her faith, compassion, and innovative ministry. Her work has impacted many lives, and she continues to be a role model in her field.

Matt Ayars

Matt Ayars is the Lead Pastor of Wellspring Church. He previously served as President of Wesley Biblical Seminary and Emmaus University of Haiti, and is the author of several books. Matt earned a BA from Asbury University, an MA in Biblical Literature from Wesley Biblical Seminary, and a PhD in Old Testament Studies from the University of Chester.

Walter Kim

Walter Kim is President of the National Association of Evangelicals. He earned his PhD at Harvard, was a chaplain at Yale, and has served in diverse pastoral ministries. He is on the board of World Relief, Christianity Today, and The Salvation Army, USA. He is often sought out for his theological and cultural commentary on issues facing the church and society.

Cadets Session

The Lord will march out like a champion, like a warrior he will stir up his zeal; with a shout he will raise the battle cry and will triumph over his enemies. - Isaiah 42:13

Appointments effective Monday, June 22, 2026

Young Adults

This Is Your Moment.

At Commissioning 2026, you’re invited to be part of a powerful weekend of worship, connection, and purpose—with Saturday featuring special experiences for young adults. From community outreach and shared meals to passionate worship and send-offs for this year’s Summer Service Corps teams, it’s a day that puts your generation in the spotlight.

While the whole weekend brings us together, Saturday is a time to connect with others in your season of life, ask big questions, and lean into what God might be saying to you right now.

Pastors, mentors, leaders—encourage the young adults in your circles to show up.
This isn’t a side track or a youth event. It’s a meaningful invitation to step fully into the life of the Church and the mission we share.

Don’t sit this one out.
Come be part of something bigger at Commissioning 2026.

Register Now

Youth Conference

At Commissioning 2026, the Youth Conference offers an exciting, Christ-centered experience tailored for children ages 5–12, with loving and secure childcare available for little ones aged 6 months to 4 years. While you engage in powerful worship and teaching, your kids will be growing in their own faith through age-appropriate activities, dynamic Bible lessons, music, and new friendships in a safe, nurturing environment.

Parents and pastors—this is more than childcare. It’s an investment in the next generation of disciples.

Spots are limited! Pre-registration and completed paperwork are REQUIRED by Friday, May 29th—no exceptions.

Don’t miss this opportunity for your children to be part of something unforgettable.

Lodging Information

All General Attendees are welcome to book their own hotel rooms at a discounted rate at the following hotel. If you are booking for someone else, please ensure the reservation(s) are made in the name of the individual(s) staying in the room.

Marriott Courtyard
1236 Executive Park Dr NE
Atlanta, GA 30329

To book, please click the "lodging details" button OR feel free to call the hotel directly at 888-236-2427;
and use the group name "Salvation Army Southern Territorial Headquarters Commissioning Event" to receive our special group rate!

GROUP RATE DEADLINE:
Thursday, June 4, 2026

Please note that our event's hotel room block booking period may fill quickly. We recommend booking early to secure your accommodations. We look forward to welcoming you to Commissioning Weekend.

Lodging Details

Details coming soon!

Trade Store

Shop Online & Pick Up In Store

Order your event essentials, gifts, and uniforms online at Trade South and pick up your order at the event! Skip the line and guarantee your items are ready for you.

Shop Trade South Online

Spread the Word

Help us invite others to this incredible event! Local community and church leaders play a vital role in sharing the excitement and encouraging attendance. We’ve made it easy for you to promote the event with ready-to-use promotional materials!

What’s Available?
✔️ Event Flyer – Perfect for digital sharing or printing.
✔️ Announcement Slide – Use it during Sunday worship, Bible studies, or other gatherings.

Your support in spreading the word ensures that more people can experience this powerful time of worship, teaching, and fellowship. Thank you for partnering with us!
